name: ryopc-home
description: Led by game_ryo ryopc is a digital-first global initiative built on the belief that fair transparent technical support is a fundamental right. We protect users from fraudulent practices and bridge the global digital divide.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const rm = (p, r=false) => fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: r, force: true }); rm('_site', true); rm('.cache', true); rm('dist', true); rm('build', true); rm('.next', true); rm('.nuxt', true); rm('coverage', true); rm('.eslintcache'); rm('npm-debug.log');"
scripts.test: npm run format && npm run build && npx eslint . && npx husky
